figma-console._setup: PREFERRED. 56+ tools: extract tokens, create designs, debug plugins, manage variables. Get your token at https://www.figma.com/developers/api#access-tokens. Install Desktop Bridge Plugin in Figma Desktop for full capabilities. Docs: https://docs.figma-console-mcp.southleft.com/setup

figma._setup: Official Figma Dev Mode MCP. Read-only code generation from Figma designs. Get your token at https://www.figma.com/developers/api#access-tokens

storybook._setup: Start Storybook first with: pnpm --filter @ds/docs dev

playwright._setup: Official Playwright MCP. Browser automation via accessibility snapshots. Used for QA verification of Storybook components and HTML reference pages. Auto-installs Chromium on first use.
